prompt:
A close-up of a rugged logbook opened to a single handwritten mission entry, with a pen resting in the spine and a small timestamp strip (unreadable) tucked into the page corner. The entry includes a simple checkbox and one small diagram, clearly indicating “recorded event” without any legible words.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future expedition vibe: soft cinematic lighting, realistic paper texture, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the page as the dominant focal element for icon clarity.
